title: ASC Application Settings (asc.settings.yaml)
description: Application settings definition referenced from asc.yaml via 'settings: ./asc.settings.yaml'. Users fill these values at install time (platform UI renders a form, CLI asks interactively, silent mode uses defaults).

quota.description: Resource quota applied to the app instance at install/upgrade time (max CPU, RAM, disk)

max_cpu.description: CPU cores limit, e.g. 0.5 or 2 (Docker: NanoCpus)

max_ram.description: Memory limit as a size string, e.g. 512M or 2G (Docker: Memory)

max_disk.description: Disk usage limit, e.g. 10G (recorded; per-runtime enforcement is incremental)

start_command.description: Start command override; supports ${VAR} interpolation from the app environment (applied with DMN-018)

type.description: Setting type; 'secret' values are stored encrypted and masked in UI/logs

description.description: Help text shown next to the field

default.description: Default value; required for silent installs unless 'required' is true

pattern.description: Regex the value must match (type: string)

env.description: Environment variable to expose the value as (optional)
